field_definitions.movement_cost: Action point multiplier. Base AP cost × this value = tile crossing cost. Open = 1.0 baseline.
field_definitions.cover_bonus: Bonus added to defender's D20 roll vs direct fire. Range 0–5.
field_definitions.concealment: Difficulty modifier for observer spotting. Added to spotting DC. Range 0–5.
field_definitions.los_range_mod: Multiplier applied to max observation/fire range. <1 degrades, >1 extends.
field_definitions.logistics: Boolean flags: can each unit class enter without engineer support?
field_definitions.unit_restrictions: Narrative constraints from doctrine requiring human/engine adjudication.

terrain_tiles.label: Open / Farmland
terrain_tiles.notes: OAKOC avenues of approach—high trafficability. No cover or concealment for defender.

terrain_tiles.label: Sparse Urban
unit_restrictions: Airmobile LZs require open area clearance
terrain_tiles.notes: Scattered buildings; moderate overhead cover and channeled lines of fire. Key terrain per ASCOPE.

terrain_tiles.label: Dense Urban
unit_restrictions: Tanks cannot enter without infantry support (ATP 3-21.20)
Wheeled vehicles limited to main roads
terrain_tiles.notes: Dominant terrain for IPB Step 2. Severely restricts avenues of approach, provides maximum cover/concealment to defender. Observation & Fields of Fire severely degraded.

terrain_tiles.label: Light Forest / Scrub
unit_restrictions: Airmobile LZs absent unless clearing available
terrain_tiles.notes: High concealment, limited cover. Favors infantry. Reduces aerial observation.

terrain_tiles.label: Dense Forest / Jungle
unit_restrictions: Mechanized/wheeled assets restricted to established trails
terrain_tiles.notes: Severely restricts mobility corridors. Excellent concealment. Danger close fire missions require infantry adjustment.

terrain_tiles.label: Marsh / Wetland
unit_restrictions: Tracked assets require soil bearing capacity >25 kPa
terrain_tiles.notes: Obstacle to mechanized forces. Supports engineer obstacle analysis. Limited LOS degradation—poor cover.

terrain_tiles.label: High Ground / Ridge
unit_restrictions: Wheeled vehicles restricted to established switchback routes
terrain_tiles.notes: Key terrain per OAKOC—seizure provides observation and fields of fire advantage. Exposes attacker crossing crestline (silhouette).

terrain_tiles.label: Hardball Road / MSR
unit_restrictions: IED emplacement risk elevates threat COA analysis
terrain_tiles.notes: Primary avenue of approach for logistics. Main Supply Route (MSR) classification. Canalization = decisive terrain for threat interdiction COAs.

terrain_tiles.label: River / Water Obstacle
unit_restrictions: Impassable without bridging or fording site (< 0.9m depth for wheeled)
terrain_tiles.notes: Hard obstacle. Fording sites and bridges are decisive terrain features. IPB must identify crossing sites, current speed, and bank slope.

terrain_tiles.label: Desert / Arid Open
terrain_tiles.notes: Extended LOS favors long-range direct fire and aerial observation. Near-zero cover/concealment—attacker exposed. Duststorms temporarily reduce LOS to 0.2.

terrain_tiles.label: Minefield / Obstacle Belt
unit_restrictions: Breach reduces cost to adjacent terrain + 2.0
All units require engineer support or route around
terrain_tiles.notes: Manmade obstacle. Must be templated on SITEMP. IPB Step 4 threat COA must account for obstacle integration into defensive scheme.

terrain_tiles.label: Airfield / LZ
terrain_tiles.notes: Decisive terrain per ASCOPE (structure). Control of airfield enables airmobile and air assault operations. High-value target for threat interdiction.
